zh.Worcestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾
zh.Besford, Worcestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾貝斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Besford於1319年出生在英國武斯特斯爾貝斯福德時，他的父親John de Besford24歲，母親Joan de Harley25歲。他於大約1359年與Beatrice Thorndon在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1382年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1400年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾貝斯福德享年81歲。

zh-hans.Besford, Worcestershire, England: 英国英格兰武斯特斯爾貝斯福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Besford于1319年出生在英国武斯特斯爾貝斯福德时，他的父亲John de Besford24岁，母亲Joan de Harley25岁。他于大约1359年与Beatrice Thorndon在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1382年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1400年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾貝斯福德享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Besford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Besford (Worcs) or Besford in Shawbury (Shrops).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Besford was born in 1319, in Besford, Worcestershire, England, his father, John de Besford, was 24 and his mother, Joan de Harley, was 25. He married Beatrice Thorndon about 1359, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1382, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1400, in Besford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Besford est né en 1319, à Besford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Besford, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan de Harley, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Thorndon environ 1359, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1382, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1400, à Besford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Besford 1319 in Besford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Besford 24 und seine Mutter Joan de Harley 25. Er hat um 1359 in Worcestershire, England Beatrice Thorndon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1382 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Besford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Besford è nato il nel 1319 nel Besford, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John de Besford, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Harley, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Thorndon circa 1359, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1382, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1400, nel Besford, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.Worcestershire, England: イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイア
ja.Besford, Worcestershire, England: イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベスフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Besfordが1319年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベスフォードで生まれた時，父John de Besfordは24歳，母Joan de Harleyは25歳であった。約1359年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでBeatrice Thorndonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1382年，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1400年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベスフォードで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Besford(이)가 1319년 영국 워스스터실르 베스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Besford(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Harley(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국 워스스터실르에서 Beatrice Thorndon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1382년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 베스퍼드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Besford nasceu em 1319, em Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Besford, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Harley, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Thorndon aproximadamente 1359, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1382, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1400, em Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Besford родился в 1319 г. в местности бесфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Besford было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Harley, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Thorndon около 1359 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1382 году он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности бесфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Besford nació en 1319, en Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Besford, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan de Harley, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Beatrice Thorndon aproximadamente 1359, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1382, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1400, en Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
